parameters.name: GovernanceItemType
parameters.description: The check item. For more information, see [Identity and access governance check items](https://help.aliyun.com/zh/ram/user-guide/overview-of-cloud-governance-for-ram?spm=a2c4g.11174283.0.0.88b3de53tfL5XG#section-q06-p9p-8vl).

parameters.name: Marker
parameters.description: If the response is truncated, use the `Marker` to retrieve the subsequent content.

parameters.name: MaxItems
parameters.description:
The number of entries to return. If the response is truncated because the number of entries exceeds the value of `MaxItems`, the value of the `IsTruncated` parameter is true.

Valid values: 1 to 1000. Default value: 1000.
